title: Communication Practices and Social Impacts Working Group
content:
Communication Practices and Social Impacts Working Group

Research Focus

The Communication Practices and Social Impacts Working Group's research focus consists of the following topics:

• The transformation of communication practices in everyday life

• Forms of communication and interaction shaped through digital environments

• The effects of communication processes on individuals' perceptions, attitudes, and behaviors

• The relationship between communication practices and consumption behaviors

• Perceptions of trust and the social repercussions of misinformation in digital environments

• The effects of communication processes on social awareness and public debate

• Examining the dynamics of social change in the context of media and communication
